assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes daily_maintenance_window with start_time at 03:00, and the shell script sets recurrence with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA,SU for weekends

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The shell script includes gcloud container clusters update with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The configuration includes quarterly freeze periods (Q1-Q4) with start and end dates, though the periods are 16-17 days which is within the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Both Terraform and shell script configurations include a November audit exclusion covering the entire month

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance window enforcement

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes release_channel settings with STABLE for production and REGULAR for other environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The shell script includes multiple gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
